entry.title: New: RES25-133 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING A CIVIL ACTION TO TAKE POSSESSION OF 48-389 KAMEHAMEHA HIGHWAY, KANEOHE, HAWAIʻI 96744.

Authorizing the Corporation Counsel to bring an action against John Tangaro and any other person occupying the property located at 48-389 Kamehameha Highway, Kaneohe, Hawai’i 96744, without the City’s consent in the Courts of the State of Hawaii to obtain any and all relief necessary to put the City in possession and control of the aforementioned property, and to do any and all acts necessary to carry out the provisions of this resolution.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
